entries.label: TT&C Baseline
entries.notes: Standard tracking, telemetry, and command load. Continuous duty assumed for baseline.

entries.label: RF Relay Payload
entries.notes: High-power RF relay. Duty fraction reflects typical link scheduling. Peak power may be higher during active relay periods.

entries.label: Optical Inter-Satellite Link
entries.notes: Optical ISL with moderate duty cycle. Thermal pointing loads not included. PAT system overhead excluded from this archetype.

entries.label: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) Class
entries.notes: SAR-class radar; very high instantaneous power, low duty cycle. Thermal storage critical for burst management. Values are class estimates; specific system varies widely.

entries.label: Mixed Mission (TT&C + RF + Optical)
entries.notes: Representative mixed payload combining TT&C, RF relay, and optical crosslink functions. Duty fraction is an aggregate estimate.

entries.label: Custom Payload (Operator-Specified)
entries.notes: All values must be specified by operator.
